process.commandLine: C:\Windows\System32\cmd.exe /c "(echo x>C:\temp\wxc_test_outside\leak.txt) 2>nul && (echo LEAK:outside_write&exit 1) || (echo OK:outside_write_denied) & (type C:\temp\wxc_test_outside\secret.txt 2>nul | findstr SECRET >nul) && (echo LEAK:outside_read&exit 1) || (echo OK:outside_read_denied) & (echo x>C:\temp\wxc_test_allowed\inside_ok.txt) 2>nul && (echo OK:inside_write) || (echo FAIL:inside_write&exit 1) & exit 0"
